name: Be My Princess
overview: Part-time translator Ming Wei is cast as the lead in a drama with award-winning actor Mu Tingzhou. After an accident, he loses his memory and believes Ming Wei is the princess from their drama. As she helps him recover, their connection deepens leading to a heartfelt romance.

trailers.title: Special: Be My Princess (Starring Xu Zhengxi, Zhou Jieqiong) | 影帝的公主 | iQiyi
